name: @flitdrop/desktop
description: Flitdrop pour le bureau : l'AirDrop de Windows, chiffre de bout en bout.
author: Flitdrop

scripts.dist:win: npm run prepare:app && electron-builder --win nsis appx --publish never
scripts.dist:win:ci: npm run prepare:app && electron-builder --win nsis --publish never
scripts.dist:mac: npm run prepare:app && electron-builder --mac dir --publish never && node make-dmg.mjs
